# Uniting Hearts

> Baháʼí dating and matchmaking community helping singles find meaningful connections rooted in shared values, unity, and spiritual growth.

Uniting Hearts is a faith-based dating platform for members of the Baháʼí community worldwide. Members create profiles, browse matches, message after mutual interest, and video-call within the app. Subscriptions unlock browsing and messaging.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Uniting Hearts and how it works.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account or log in.
- [Subscription](/subscription): Plans and pricing for premium access.
- [Safety Tips](/safety): Guidance for safe online dating and meeting in person.
- [Install](/install): Install Uniting Hearts as a PWA on your device.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Uniting Hearts team.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Terms governing use of the platform.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle your personal data.
